text:
MCCRACKEN COUNTY — The McCracken County Special Olympics Track Team is traveling to Richmond, Kentucky, for the State Summer Games.

The team has been practicing to prepare for the event, and their hard work paid off as they packed up the sprinter vans and left from Reidland Middle School Friday morning.

title: McCracken Special Olympics head to Summer Games | News | paducahsun.com
author: SUN STAFF
description: The McCracken County Special Olympics Track Team is traveling to Richmond, Kentucky, for the State Summer Games. The team set out from Reidland Middle School Friday morning.
keywords: mccracken county special olympics track team, kentucky, state, summer games, richmond, sendoff, sports
